description: Search local OfferUp listings from your terminal, keep them in a local database, and spot underpriced deals before anyone else — no login and no paid key for the things that matter most.

tools.name: listings_get
tools.description: Get the full detail for one listing. Required: listing_id. Returns the Listing.

params.name: listing_id
params.description: Listing id (UUID from a search result)

tools.name: listings_search
tools.description: Search live OfferUp listings by keyword and location. Required: query. Optional: category. Returns array of Listing.

params.name: category
params.description: Category id to scope the search (e.g. 1 for electronics; hierarchical like 1.2)
